name: ALGOWATT S.P.A.
summary: Algowatt S.p.A., now TerniEnergia S.p.A., operates in the renewable energy sector, providing services related to solar energy, energy efficiency, and waste management. The company offers EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services, O&M (Operation & Maintenance) services, and develops renewable energy plants. It is headquartered in Nera Montoro, Italy.
